full_text:
Ru Chun 如淳
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ru Chun (如淳)was born in Pingyi commandery. Annotated various works including the Book of Han. Ru Chun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
